what_it_does: This file is a channel-memory attachment record that links an attachment identifier to a board item via metadata frontmatter.
observations: The file contains only YAML frontmatter with no body content.
Fields include id, channel, attachment_type, target, and added timestamp.
The target is a board:// URI pointing to item-da3eb0f9.
standouts: The target uses a board://item-da3eb0f9 URI scheme.
The record is purely metadata with no payload body.
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter with a standard set of metadata fields.
References external entities with URI-style identifiers.
concerns: No descriptive payload or context beyond the target reference, so the attachment's meaning is opaque without the board item.
notes: A bare metadata stub that ties a dragnet-development channel attachment to board item da3eb0f9.
questions: What content or decision does board item da3eb0f9 represent?
What semantics does attachment_type board_items imply?
Why was this attachment created at the given timestamp?
intention_signals: It appears intended to create a persistent, timestamped association between a channel memory attachment and a specific board item.
novelty: The use of a board:// URI scheme as a target reference is a distinct linking pattern.
contribution: It contributes a persistent, timestamped cross-reference between a channel memory attachment and a board item, enabling lookup and contextual association without embedding the board content.
summary_for_embedding: A YAML-frontmatter attachment record named att-363da38a in the dragnet-development channel that references board item item-da3eb0f9 with type board_items and an added timestamp.
intention_for_embedding: This file was created to link a channel memory attachment to a board item for traceability and cross-reference.
